_description: Machine specifications, maximum OCV, weldable materials, and general info from manual page 7.

TIG.tungsten_tip_prep: Conical point — 2.5x electrode diameter length, ground parallel to electrode length

power_requirements.120V: 20-amp circuit with GFCI protection, delayed-action circuit breaker
power_requirements.240V: GFCI protected 240V receptacle, delayed-action circuit breaker
power_requirements.extension_cord: NOT ALLOWED — do not use any extension cord with this welder
power_requirements.grounding: Must be connected to grounded outlet only

thermal_protection: Internal thermal protection auto-shuts down on overheat. Leave Power Switch ON — fan cools the unit. Auto-restarts when cool.
warranty: 90 days limited warranty from Harbor Freight Tools
